TSN.5.HD.ca2.title: The Pitch
TSN.5.HD.ca2.subtitle: The Vision
TSN.5.HD.ca2.description: After retiring from international soccer, Diana Matheson sets out to build what has never existed: a professional women's soccer league in Canada. Moving between past and present, the episode traces the resilience of women who succeeded despite a system that worked against them - and the urgency that drives the league's creation. As Matheson and her team take the first steps toward making the league real, they confront skepticism, institutional resistance, and the risk of starting from nothing.

TSN.1.ca2.title: The Pitch
TSN.1.ca2.subtitle: The Vision
TSN.1.ca2.description: After retiring from international soccer, Diana Matheson sets out to build what has never existed: a professional women's soccer league in Canada. Moving between past and present, the episode traces the resilience of women who succeeded despite a system that worked against them - and the urgency that drives the league's creation. As Matheson and her team take the first steps toward making the league real, they confront skepticism, institutional resistance, and the risk of starting from nothing.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Greatest Showman
HBO.East.us2.description: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

HBO.East.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.East.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.East.us2.title: Greenland
HBO.East.us2.description: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

HBO.East.us2.title: Life of Pi
HBO.East.us2.description: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

HBO.East.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
HBO.East.us2.description: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

HBO.East.us2.subtitle: America My Dream

HBO.East.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.East.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: Dying to Flying
HBO.East.us2.description: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

HBO.East.us2.title: No Hard Feelings
HBO.East.us2.description: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.East.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.East.us2.title: Little Miss Sunshine
HBO.East.us2.description: The Hoover family -- a man (Greg Kinnear), his wife (Toni Collette), an uncle (Steve Carell), a brother (Paul Dano) and a grandfather (Alan Arkin) -- puts the fun back in dysfunctional by piling into a VW bus and heading to California to support a daughter (Abigail Breslin) in her bid to win the Little Miss Sunshine Contest. The sanity of everyone involved is stretched to the limit as the group's quirks cause epic problems as they travel along their interstate route.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien 3
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien Resurrection
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Joker
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

HBO.West.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.West.us2.description: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

HBO.West.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.West.us2.description: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.West.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Mummy Returns
HBO.West.us2.description: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
HBO.West.us2.description: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Mummy

HBO.West.us2.subtitle: Valerie Lights a Candle

HBO.West.us2.title: Christy
HBO.West.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.West.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.West.us2.subtitle: America My Dream
HBO.West.us2.description: Rue travels to Mexico and confronts displacement; Jules navigates art school pressures and reflects generational struggles.

HBO.West.us2.description: Ruben shows up unexpectedly at Niall's wedding; this surprise visit turns what should be a joyous occasion into chaos, leading to an eruption of violence that catapults back through the decades.

HBO.West.us2.title: No Hard Feelings
HBO.West.us2.description: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Girls Trip
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Tour de Pharmacy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Five competitors provide an inside look at the world of professional cycling and its checkered history with doping.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sarah Squirm: Live + in the Flesh
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sarah Sherman's unholy alter ego, Sarah Squirm, unleashes a festering hour of bodily fluids, open-wound confessionals and jokes that will leave scars on the soul.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Zola
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Friendship
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Monster-in-Law
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her new competition -- and will apparently do anything to make her son call off the wedding.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Coastal Elites
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Five characters in isolation react with frustration, hilarity and introspection as they grapple with politics, culture, and the pandemic.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Norm of the North
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: House Party
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Clear History
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An angry man concocts an elaborate plan for revenge when his old boss visits the island that he calls home.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: High-school student Hal Hefner's (Reece Daniel Thompson) life is falling down around him. His parents have split, his brother picks on him incessantly, and he has a terrible stutter. Hal cannot believe it when Ginny Ryerson (Anna Kendrick), a pretty classmate, asks him to join their school's debate team. Falling head over heels in love with Ginny, he agrees to her request, with unexpected results.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Paddington 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Death Consequence
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Dean Potter finds joy and escape through his early success at extreme climbing, where he connects with a community of like-minded people seeking the sport's freedom and adrenaline; Dean's restless energy compels him to pioneer new ascents and forge new world records, even while at times falling afoul of the establishment and struggling with personal relationships.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Night Is Not Eternal
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Night Is Not Eternal is a deeply personal exploration of political activism through the eyes of Chinese American filmmaker Nanfu Wang. For over seven years, Nanfu follows Rosa Maria Paya, a young Cuban activist and daughter of five-time Nobel Peace Prize nominee Oswaldo Paya, in her fight for democratic change in Cuba. Driven by her own experiences in China, Nanfu is drawn to Rosa's story and the parallels between their homelands. With intimate access, Nanfu follows Rosa's journey from the streets of Havana to rallies and conferences worldwide, capturing her transformation from a grassroots activist to an international public figure and documenting the challenges faced by activists resisting authoritarian regimes.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Triangle: Remembering the Fire
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: On March 25, 1911, a conflagration at the Triangle Shirtwaist Factory in New York kills 146 workers, primarily young women and teenage girls, and sparked legislation to improve stafety standards in factories.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Surveilled
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tracking The New Yorker journalist Ronan Farrow as he investigates the growing business of commercial spyware, following the story from New York City to Tel Aviv, Israel, a thriving center of espionage cybertechnology. Once a target of covert surveillance himself, Farrow explores the multibillion-dollar industry, addressing the twofold uses and implications of phone hacking, the ability to monitor criminal activity and the attendant threats to civil liberties.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dear Ms.: A Revolution in Print
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A deep dive into the storied and complex legacy of "Ms." magazine through the lens of some of its covers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Twilight
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Enemy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune: Part Two
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Trees, and Other Entanglements
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: People and the natural world intertwine in the stories of a young boy hidden among trees, an artist refining American bonsai, a photographer observing trees, a mother fighting to protect the forests and a man who steadfastly plants them.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Burning Ojai: Our Fire Story
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Documenting one of the largest wildfires in California's history as well as the aftermath; interviews with residents of Ventura County affected by the devastation.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ice on Fire
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Visionaries and scientists work to mitigate climate change and minimize climate-related events, despite a rapidly warming planet.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Gasland Part II
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmmaker Josh Fox examines the potential long-term environmental impact of hydraulic fracturing, including poisonous water and earthquakes.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Elizabeth I
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The Queen of England balances her personal desires with the prospect of a strategic marriage, but she cannot wed the Earl of Leicester and would not marry the Earl of Essex.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Elizabeth I
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The Queen of England balances her personal desires with the prospect of a strategic marriage, but she cannot wed the Earl of Leicester and would not marry the Earl of Essex.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: MacGruber
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Black Adam
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: X-Men: First Class
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: MoviePass, MovieCrash
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Exploring the company's founding and the implosion that occurred after outside investors took over, rendering the company bankrupt and under investigation.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Mom Jayne
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Mariska Hargitay's journey to understand and embrace the public and private legacy of her mother, Hollywood icon Jayne Mansfield.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Elizabeth Taylor: The Lost Tapes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Allowing Elizabeth Taylor ́s own voice to narrate her story, accompanied by personal photos, home movies, and clips from her iconic roles that mirror her real life challenges and triumphs while also challenging audiences to reconsider Taylor ́s legacy. Through newly discovered interviews with Taylor and unprecedented access to the movie star ́s personal archive, the film reveals the complex inner life and vulnerability of the Hollywood legend and of a life lived on a global stage.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Cinema Verite The Saga of an American Family
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the 1970s Bill Loud (Tim Robbins) and his wife, Pat (Diane Lane), allow cameras to film their personal lives for the PBS series "An American Family.".

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dust Bunny
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Blair Witch Project
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Found video footage tells the tale of three film students (Heather Donahue, Joshua Leonard, Michael C. Williams) who've traveled to a small town to collect documentary footage about the Blair Witch, a legendary local murderer. Over the course of several days, the students interview townspeople and gather clues to support the tale's veracity. But the project takes a frightening turn when the students lose their way in the woods and begin hearing horrific noises.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As it follows the twisted path traveled by five people fixated on "The Blair Witch Project," "Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2" journeys into a dark and dangerous place where the line between truth and fiction blurs and perhaps vanishes altogether. Individual perception grows increasingly untrustworthy as the film's protagonists find themselves caught in a vortex of unspeakable evil, the origins of which -- human or supernatural -- remain chillingly uncertain.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Blair Witch
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young man and his friends venture into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland to uncover the mystery surrounding his missing sister. Many believe her disappearance 17 years earlier is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. At first the group is hopeful, especially when two locals act as guides through the dark and winding woods. As the night wears on, a visit from a menacing presence soon makes them realize that the legend is all too real, and more sinister than they could have ever imagined.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Call Me by Your Name
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Insidious
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Moonlight
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Smashing Machine
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The true story of mixed martial arts and UFC fighter Mark Kerr, whose obsession with greatness made him a legend -- and nearly cost him everything.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Fire and Water
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1991, the murder of four teenage girls rocks the city of Austin; a lack of hard evidence soon thwarts the investigation.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Fifth Victim
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After years of false leads and wrongful arrests, new investigators take over the case and revisit a key interrogation video.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Mental Evidence
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As the investigation increasingly focuses on the young suspects, police subject them to further videotaped interrogations, which reveal contradictory and unstable versions of what happened and some confessions.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: In Your Own Time
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When new DNA evidence leads to Springsteen and Scott's release, the victims' families must grapple with the unknown.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
AMC.HD.us2.description: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Boobs in Arms
AMC.HD.us2.description: The boys unwittingly enlist in the Army.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Scotched in Scotland
AMC.HD.us2.description: The boys trail burglars to a Scottish castle.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Martian
AMC.HD.us2.description: When astronauts blast off from the planet Mars, they leave behind Mark Watney, presumed dead after a fierce storm. With only a meager amount of supplies, the stranded visitor must utilize his wits and spirit to find a way to survive on the hostile planet. Meanwhile, back on Earth, members of NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home, while his crew mates hatch their own plan for a daring rescue mission.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ghostbusters
AMC.HD.us2.description: After the members of a team of scientists (Harold Ramis, Dan Aykroyd, Bill Murray) lose their cushy positions at a university in New York City, they decide to become "ghostbusters" to wage a high-tech battle with the supernatural for money. They stumble upon a gateway to another dimension, a doorway that will release evil upon the city. The Ghostbusters must now save New York from complete destruction.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Lost Boys
AMC.HD.us2.description: Teenage brothers Michael (Jason Patric) and Sam (Corey Haim) move with their mother (Dianne Wiest) to a small town in northern California. While the younger Sam meets a pair of kindred spirits in geeky comic-book nerds Edward (Corey Feldman) and Alan (Jamison Newlander), the angst-ridden Michael soon falls for Star (Jami Gertz) -- who turns out to be in thrall to David (Kiefer Sutherland), leader of a local gang of vampires. Sam and his new friends must save Michael and Star from the undead.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Beetlejuice
AMC.HD.us2.description: After Barbara and Adam Maitland die in a car accident, they find themselves stuck haunting their country residence, unable to leave the house. When the unbearable Deetzes and teen daughter Lydia buy the home, the Maitlands attempt to scare them away without success. Their efforts attract Beetlejuice, a rambunctious spirit whose help quickly becomes dangerous for the Maitlands and innocent Lydia.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games
AMC.HD.us2.description: In what was once North America, the Capitol of Panem maintains its hold on its 12 districts by forcing them each to select a boy and a girl, called Tributes, to compete in a nationally televised event called the Hunger Games. Every citizen must watch as the youths fight to the death until only one remains. District 12 Tribute Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) has little to rely on, other than her hunting skills and sharp instincts, in an arena where she must weigh survival against love.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
AMC.HD.us2.description: After arriving safely home from their unprecedented victory in the 74th Annual Hunger Games, Katniss Everdeen (Jennifer Lawrence) and Peeta Mellark (Josh Hutcherson) discover that they must do a quick turnaround and begin a Victors Tour. As she and Peeta travel throughout the districts, Katniss senses a rebellion is stirring. However, President Snow (Donald Sutherland) proves that he is still very much in control when word comes of a cruel change in the rules for the upcoming 75th Hunger Games.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La erección de la discordia; En el nombre del padre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lili es despedida de su trabajo como mesera porque ha tenido una erección en horario laboral. Además, un pastor rompe el acuerdo de mantener al hijo de Mónica porque ella fue infiel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Yo te acepto como esposa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura queda destrozada cuando el avión en el que viajaba su esposo Alberto tiene un accidente y no hay sobrevivientes. Una tragedia que le permite descubrir que durante años vivió una mentira.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ese hombre no se toca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniela quiere que Lizeth, ex de su esposo, entienda que Daniel ya no es su marido y que la relación se terminó, pero ella usa al hijo que tienen en común como pretexto para mantener el contacto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pubertad precoz; El torturador
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Con apenas dos años, la hija de Yanexis tiene sangrado menstrual y es rechazada en la guardería. Al salir de su país, Lourdes dejó a su hijo en manos del hombre que la maltrataba y torturaba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La última voluntad; Ahogada por manguera negra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tania cumplió el deseo de su hijo: lo embalsamó y lo expuso como estatua en la sala. La esposa de Alberto murió asfixiada al practicarle sexo oral a Carlos, un hombre con un miembro inusual.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Enséñame humildad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marina vive en la calle y es víctima de explotación. Ella sueña con estudiar y mejorar su vida, pero su situación no se lo permite. Luego de que Leopoldo la atropella con su auto, la vida cambia para ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lazos recuperados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Federico y Mónica pierden a su hijo Jorgito justo el día del nacimiento de Pablito. El padre, ante el dolor, se entrega a la bebida y abandona a su familia, pero los lazos de amor siempre pueden recuperarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Al borde de la muerte
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diego está desesperado por ver a su padrastro. Logra que Circe lo lleve hasta el lugar donde tienen a Joselito y a Augusto, allí sucede algo inesperado. Gavino planifica su salida de la cárcel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Actores y amigos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ángel y Rubén son actores de teatro y vienen no solo a ganar, sino a duplicar los premios. Raúl y Mauricio, amigos desde la secundaria, deciden aprovechar el premio para irse juntos de viaje.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El pecado del salchichón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Norberto contrata a una prostituta, pero no puede consumar el acto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 34 de la temporada regular 2025-26 de la Premier League. Brighton & Hove Albion se enfrenta al Chelsea. Desde el Falmer Stadium, en Brighton y Hove.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Abandonos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joseph es un hombre manipulador y egocéntrico, ahora debe reconocer sus errores antes de que su tiempo de vida se agote y así pueda dejar una lección liberadora para quienes lastimó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi suegra me adelantó el parto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luisa denuncia que su bebé está hospitalizado y corre peligro porque se le adelantó el parto tras ser agredida por su suegra Lilia, quien la acusa de mentir sobre la paternidad de su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La amante lo botó y ahora quiere regresar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erika está desesperada porque Oswaldo, su esposo, la echó junto a sus hijos para meter a su amante y, ahora que él está enfermo y abandonado ha vuelto a buscarla para que lo cuide.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muerto sin querer; Ladrón de familia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Samuel desapareció por un año y lo declararon muerto, pero regresa y descubre una nueva faceta de su esposa. Carlos era pareja de Sonia pero se fue de casa con una de las hijas de ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Llamada de Dios a volar; Amor a las patadas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Yanni reclama su herencia para unirse a las Monjas del Monte, una congregación dedicada a cultivar cannabis. Rebeca sabe que su hermana es maltratada por su esposo, pero no lo quiere reconocer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por cobarde perdí a mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lulú quiere dejar a Lisandro tras 18 años de maltrato y recuperar la relación con sus cuatro hijos, quienes abandonaron el hogar porque también fueron agredidos por su padrastro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Diego duerme con el enemigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Augusto está en el hospital y Diego va a eliminarlo. Circe prefiere matar al hombre que desea antes de que sepa la verdad sobre su hermano. Marlene toma una decisión respecto a su boda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amo a mi gordo; Tiamat, la mujer dragón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: A Rasse le gusta que su pareja engorde, pero su esposo Jesús ya pesa 170 kilos y quiere bajar de peso por su salud. Tiamat tiene tatuajes y modificaciones corporales que molestan a su hija.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Atrapados en el hotel; Confianza mató a mi hijo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel grabó a su esposa con su amante y publicó el video; el otro perdió su trabajo y su matrimonio. El hijo de Ricardo murió a manos de su profesor, quien se suicidó; él culpa a su esposa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Secreto de hermanas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Patricio se casa con Rosa María porque está embarazada, sin saber que Delia también espera un hijo suyo. Con el tiempo, Edna y Mariana se convierten en amigas, aunque no tienen idea del lazo que las une.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La amante lo botó y ahora quiere regresar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erika está desesperada porque Oswaldo, su esposo, la echó junto a sus hijos para meter a su amante y, ahora que él está enfermo y abandonado ha vuelto a buscarla para que lo cuide.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Para, que me duele; Sangre curadora
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Susana es una actriz porno que denuncia que la violaron en una película, pues no pudo decir la palabra clave. Katia consume sangre humana desde que era una niña como parte de una tradición familiar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Inseminación fallida; Hijo de la mafia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Óscar y su pareja decidieron alquilar un vientre para tener hijos, pero el chico murió. También, los hijos de Ricardo descubrieron que su mamá es una narcotraficante de renombre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un nuevo amanecer
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Eugenia está a punto de perder la vista, pero su familia no tiene recursos para una cirugía. Conoce a Daniel y el amor florece, pero una amenaza familiar pone en peligro la posibilidad de que estén juntos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Día de las Madres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Álvaro abandona su casa, le dice a Soledad que ya no la ama. Los hijos le reclaman a la madre lo sucedido y deciden irse también. Después de maltratarla, se ven obligados a pedir perdón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Diego duerme con el enemigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Augusto está en el hospital y Diego va a eliminarlo. Circe prefiere matar al hombre que desea antes de que sepa la verdad sobre su hermano. Marlene toma una decisión respecto a su boda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fe fraternal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tania y David depositan la fe en ellos mismos y el resultado es muy favorable. Las hermanas Elizabeth y Liliana se emocionan tanto en el juego que los nervios las podrían traicionar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Generación diva
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Janeth y Jaime tienen dos hijas, Camila y Michell. La mayor está con ella y la menor con él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por ti
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Berenice, obsesionada de amor por su paciente, lo cuida de forma especial para que no vuelva a caminar, al conocer su propio destino, recrudece acciones para alejarlo de su familia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lucía busca a Eduardo para tomar clases de defensa personal e inician un romance. Tras recibir su llamada de auxilio, él golpea a su expareja para defenderla y ahora enfrenta amenazas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Esencia de tigre salvaje; Princesa sin cabello
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tony y Wellington buscaron a Anthony por su imagen, pero la realidad era otra. Además, Alba quiere que su esposo Tomás fabrique muñecas sin cabello, pero él piensa que no es buen negocio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La maldición de los Torres; Los tres barberos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Una joven fue secuestrada y su familia pagó con lo que tenían para lograr su liberación. Harold, Fernando y Omar trabajaban en la misma barbería, pero una broma pesada los arruinó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ese hombre no se toca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniela quiere que Lizeth, ex de su esposo, entienda que Daniel ya no es su marido y que la relación se terminó, pero ella usa al hijo que tienen en común como pretexto para mantener el contacto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Invitado incómodo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Todo va de mal en peor para Isabel: Margot Guevara la amenaza con llevarla a prisión por usar la identidad de su familiar. Circe pasa un mal rato cuando va con Diego a la tumba de su hermano.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tercera de nadie; Fotos de forense
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luciana es la esposa de Ricky G., un cantante merenguero, pero desde que se separó no tiene producciones. Además, Macaria trabaja en un departamento forense y publica fotos escalofriantes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Asesino de muñecas; Memorial Weekend
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Bryan está obsesionado con los muñecos y contrata a Antonio para que sea el Ken de su esposa. Anthony trae a su novia de Nueva York para celebrar su cumpleaños, pero se pone celoso de un chico.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una semilla de fe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La madre de Marcela se empeña en separar a su hija de Javier, sin considerar el daño que les hace a su nieta y a toda la familia. La niña está a punto de quedarse sin primera comunión, pero no pierde la fe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por defenderla puedo ir preso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lucía busca a Eduardo para tomar clases de defensa personal e inician un romance. Tras recibir su llamada de auxilio, él golpea a su expareja para defenderla y ahora enfrenta amenazas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Negocio de alquiler; Divorcio y deportación
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marcos y Gabriela contratan un vientre de alquiler, pero notan que la gestora de la criatura no está bien de salud. Luis se casa con Edith para que lo reclame legalmente, pero ella se demora.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Matona quiere dinero; Igualdad de derechos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Érica mató a su esposo y se enteró de que él le compró una casa al hijo. Ahora, ella pide que se la den. En otro caso, Margarita quiere abortar y su esposo piensa que eso es un asesinato; ella lucha por la igualdad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Después de la tormenta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Anita trabaja como servicio doméstico y se enamora de Javier, el joven de la casa. Sin embargo, después de un terrible accidente, él se deja seducir por Eloísa, una mujer llena de intenciones ocultas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La bruja de la cuadra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marcela pierde a su esposo y a su hija en un accidente automovilístico. El dolor la sume en una enorme amargura y, por eso, le dicen bruja.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La felicidad no se compra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Al perder a su padre, Ariadna y su familia quedan en la ruina lo que provoca un completo cambio en su vida. Una oportunidad para aprender que la felicidad no se compra con dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Quiero justicia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paulina, ahora adolescente, canaliza toda la frustración de sus traumas infantiles con un comportamiento cargado de ira y agresividad. Tras años de abandono, su padre regresa, justo a tiempo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amarte a ti misma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosa vive con su esposo, un golpeador que ha convencido a su hija Maya de que su madre le miente para separarlos. Cuando él termina en la cárcel, ella vivirá en carne propia la violencia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Invitado incómodo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Todo va de mal en peor para Isabel: Margot Guevara la amenaza con llevarla a prisión por usar la identidad de su familiar. Circe pasa un mal rato cuando va con Diego a la tumba de su hermano.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Con uñas y dientes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Martha y Elena luchan con todo por sus sueños, pero deben de tomar una decisión crucial. Las primas hermanas Susana e Iliana tienen fallas, pero se esfuerzan para luchar por los premios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cásate conmigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juliana rompe con su novio Fernando poco antes de casarse, pero al asumir la realidad sobre su enfermedad incurable, decide decirle la verdad y trata de reconstruir sus corazones rotos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por un chamaco nos echó de la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras superar la muerte de su esposo, Margarita echa a su hija Sayra de la casa luego de iniciar un romance con Alonso, exnovio de su nieta Alanis, a quien señala de borracha.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Respeta más al difunto que a su madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María está desesperada porque quiere recuperar la relación con su hija, que se rompió tras confesarle que su padre fallecido la obligaba a tener relaciones con otros hombres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Apariencias engañosas; Hermanos con derecho
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Angélica es una transexual que estaba con su niño en un hotel, pero la denunciaron por abuso infantil. Los hijos de Cecilia y Juan duermen en la misma habitación y eso provoca problemas de pareja.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Billboard: Mujeres latinas en la música
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuarta edición de la celebración que rinde homenaje a las artistas latinas que marcan el rumbo de la industria musical, al impulsar cambios positivos y promover la inclusión, tanto dentro como fuera del escenario. Un reconocimiento a grandes voces que han dejado una huella imborrable en la música latina y han abierto camino para las futuras generaciones, en una noche memorable de empoderamiento y presentaciones de talla mundial.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El nuevo plan de Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe debe decidir si acepta o no el rumbo que Diego quiere emprender. Él desea un cambio radical en su vida para borrar su pasado. Isabel busca desesperadamente a Diego.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fumígame Manuel; Venganza paterna
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miguel tiene una empresa de fumigación al borde de la quiebra por su inclinación a tener sexo con sus clientas. También, Marla está trabajando en casa de Marco para conseguir su ADN.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Es mi castigo; Muerto en Las Vegas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Yanier es un violador que no calificó para la castración en la cárcel y quiere pedirle a la Dra. Polo que lo deje autocastrarse. Además, Delia y su ex mantenían una casa juntos, pero él murió.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Banda Pequeños Musicales
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Banda Pachuco
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soltero codiciado "El Garza"
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hombres sexies
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los ojos de una madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aminta pierde la cabeza por amor y su madre, Leonor, intenta hacerla recapacitar mientras lucha contra un cáncer sin que su hija lo sepa. El tiempo le da la razón y descubre al verdadero Ricardo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ese hombre no se toca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniela quiere que Lizeth, ex de su esposo, entienda que Daniel ya no es su marido y que la relación se terminó, pero ella usa al hijo que tienen en común como pretexto para mantener el contacto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: De sueño a pesadilla; Vengador laboral
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura provocó la muerte por asfixia de su bebé, de forma accidental, tras consumir marihuana. Además, Gilbert es trabajador del negocio de Raúl, pero siente que este siempre lo ha discriminado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hijos traidores; La educación de doble vía
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un padre descubre que sus hijos en realidad no lo son y quiere quedarse con el dinero de la herencia de la madre. Profesora expone a un alumno que le preguntó si amar a otro hombre está bien.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Regreso inesperado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amanda decide abandonar a su esposo e hija para irse a los Estados Unidos. Siete años más tarde, regresa inesperadamente con el objetivo de recuperar a su pequeña, pero la niña y su padre ya tienen otra vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La vida entre mis brazos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rafael pierde a su esposa durante el parto de su hija, razón por la cual la repudia y se niega a tenerla entre sus brazos. Sin embargo, una difícil situación en el parque provoca un cambio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Donde nace el amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roscio es una mujer ambiciosa que decide entregar a su sobrina María Eugenia por dinero. Finalmente, Maru consigue un hogar donde hay amor, pero la inagotable codicia de su tía la persigue.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cielo: Un cambio de ruta inesperado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cielo cae en manos de una red del crimen organizado tras reunirse con Mauricio, su exnovio, quien se convierte en el principal sospechoso. La madre de la joven, con ayuda, logra encontrarla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cinthia: ¿Y si no hay mañana?
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cinthia libera su frustración acostándose con alguien diferente cada día, y al sabotear la relación de su madre demostrándole que Mario solo quiere sexo casual, confirma que necesita terapia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El nuevo plan de Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe debe decidir si acepta o no el rumbo que Diego quiere emprender. Él desea un cambio radical en su vida para borrar su pasado. Isabel busca desesperadamente a Diego.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hasta la cocina
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jessica y Óscar hacen lo imposible por llevarse una cocina completa digna de los premios de la Academia. Karla y Lorena se ven entre problemas. Fernando y Nora sufren con el tiempo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sus 15 años
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cristian huye de la policía y de sus cómplices en un robo fallido, pero decide volver para cumplir una promesa a su hija, aunque sus enemigos lo buscan y no se detendrán hasta matarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá me bajó al sugar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Danitza enfrenta a su madre Eva, quien la impulsa a iniciar una relación con un hombre mayor de 63 años para cubrir sus gastos, pero luego ella decide enamorar al mismo hombre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hermano transa, pero no avanza
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ángel denuncia que su hermano mayor, Emanuel, se ha convertido en un abusador. Desde que se mudó con él y su pareja, en la casa que heredaron de su padrastro, no aporta para los gastos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Líder energético; Women Bullying
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La madre de Katherine es esquizofrénica y le propuso un método de curación alternativo, pero el papá se opone. Karina demanda a su mejor amiga porque sufre el "Wolling", una especie de bullying.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Gozando del olvido; Otro rostro para mi negocio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis se ha casado con su nana, una anciana con problemas de memoria, y ahora es el heredero. También, Samantha sufre discriminación en el trabajo por su imagen desfigurada tras un accidente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La amante lo botó y ahora quiere regresar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erika está desesperada porque Oswaldo, su esposo, la echó junto a sus hijos para meter a su amante y, ahora que él está enfermo y abandonado ha vuelto a buscarla para que lo cuide.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Viejos amigos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Isabel no puede huir de la ciudad porque su esposo está internado en el hospital. Diego está dispuesto a hablar con Margot Guevara para contarle la verdad sobre su identidad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La necesidad tiene cara de perro; Lazos de odio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Omary y Stefany trabajan como trabajadoras sexuales en Colombia, y sus colegas no las quieren por lo que cobran. La madre de Joel lo dejó solo con su violento padre, el señor murió y ella ha regresado.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Girona-Betis
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Albacete - Eibar
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Albacete Balompié buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros desde la amplitud, con atención a la pérdida para no conceder transiciones. En la categoría, el margen es mínimo: SD Eibar intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en estrategia o a campo abierto cuando encuentre ventaja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Deportivo - Mirandés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: RC Deportivo buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, atacando el área con paciencia y control del tempo. Duelo con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: CD Mirandés intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Albacete - Eibar

Duelo con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: CD Leganés intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Huesca - Zaragoza
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Alcoraz exige duelos y concentración: el Huesca quiere un partido sobrio, con bloque compacto y mucha vigilancia a la espalda. El Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, priorizará solidez y gestión de áreas; si compite rechaces y balón parado, puede sacar puntos clave en la zona baja.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.
