sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Feyenoord Rotterdam – FC Groningen (31. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: In der höchsten Spielklasse des niederländischen Fußballs treten 18 Mannschaften an 34 Spieltagen gegeneinander an. Dabei dominieren die Vereine Ajax Amsterdam, PSV Eindhoven und Feyenoord Rotterdam. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Primeira Liga
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Benfica Lissabon – Moreirense FC (31. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Willkommen zur höchsten Spielklasse im portugiesischen Männerfußball. Eine Saison erstreckt sich über 34 Spieltage, wobei die Partien von Mitte August bis Ende Mai oder Anfang Juni ausgetragen werden. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Campeonato Brasileiro
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Botafogo – Internacional (13. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Brasilianer spielen den attraktivsten Fußball. Will man die Pelés von morgen sehen, lohnt sich ein Blick auf die nationale Meisterschaft. Die Sendung zeigt die wichtigsten Spiele der aktuellen Saison. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: A-League
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Western Sydney Wanderers – Melbourne Victory (26. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Der Fußball fristete in Australien lange ein Dasein als Randsportart, erfreut sich aber zunehmender Beliebtheit. In der höchsten Spielklasse spielen neun australische und ein neuseeländischer Club. (Senderinfo).

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Adesanya vs. Pyfer
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When the UFC returns to Climate Pledge Arena in Seattle, Washington on Saturday, March 29, it brings with it a combustible middleweight main event pitting two-time former champion Israel “The Last Stylebender” Adesanya against ascending American Joe “Bodybagz” Pyfer.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA TOP GOALS GUAYRE BETANCOR - LALIGA TOP GOALS GUAYRE BETANCOR
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: A selection of top goals from Guayre, a leading light for Villarreal in their push to become one of LaLiga’s elite.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 327: Procházka vs. Ulberg - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When UFC returns to Miami in April, it will do so with a numbered event headlined by a pair of championship bouts as UFC 327 takes place on Saturday, April 12 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida. The event will be headlined by a battle for the vacant UFC light heavyweight title between former champion and second-ranked Jiri Prochazka and surging contender Carlos “Black Jag” Ulberg. In the co-main event of the evening, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title for the first time against Tatsuro Taira

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Main Event  - UFC297 - Strickland vs Du Plessis
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Middleweight Champion Sean Strickland defends his title against South African contender Dricus Du Plessis in a thrilling showdown at UFC 297. Watch the full championship fight on this episode of Main Event.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 312: Du Plessis vs Strickland
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns down under to Sydney, Austalia, where Middleweight champion Dricus Du Plessis defends his crown against Sean Strickland, the man he took it from, and undefeated TUF 23 winner Tatiana Suarez aims to unseat 2-time champion Zhang Weili for the Women's Strawweight title. Plus more on UFC Reloaded!

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 9
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 4
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1003: Moreno vs Figueiredo 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 270 featured the third meeting between flyweight rivals Deiveson Figueiredo and Mexican champion Brandon Moreno. Relive their incredible battle like you’ve never seen it with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 312: Du Plessis vs Strickland
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns down under to Sydney, Austalia, where Middleweight champion Dricus Du Plessis defends his crown against Sean Strickland, the man he took it from, and undefeated TUF 23 winner Tatiana Suarez aims to unseat 2-time champion Zhang Weili for the Women's Strawweight title. Plus more on UFC Reloaded!

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Ultimate Knockouts - 1103: International Fighters
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Ultimate Knockouts features explosive KOs from international fighters, showcasing stars from Russia, England, and South Africa like Dricus du Plessis, Paddy Pimblett, Ilia Topuria, and more.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 321: Aspinall vs Gane
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 321 Countdown takes an inside look at the promotion’s return to Abu Dhabi, where heavyweight king Tom Aspinall battles former interim champion Ciryl Gane. Plus, Virna Jandiroba takes on Mackenzie Dern for the vacant strawweight title.
